N3XUS Marketing Pillars
3
Traditional · Digital · AI — fully integrated
01
The Philosophy Behind the Brand

The 3 in N3XUS
isn't just a number.

It represents three interconnected forces of modern marketing — each powerful alone, but transformational when unified. Most agencies offer one. We deliver all three, working as a single compounding system built around your business.

Pillar One
1
Traditional Marketing

Mass reach. Brand trust. The channels that build household recognition at scale — television, in-store activations, and experiential events that put Vital in front of millions of South Africans during peak demand periods.

  • National TV advertising — mass awareness at scale
  • In-store activations — Clicks & Dis-Chem nationwide
  • Mall stand activations — experiential consumer engagement
  • Event marketing — Comrades, Two Oceans & wellness expos
Pillar Two
2
Digital Marketing

Precision targeting. Search dominance. Converting the awareness your TV campaigns build into measurable digital traffic, online sales, and category authority — capturing the 60% of South Africans already searching health solutions online.

  • Technical SEO — make Google finally recognise your authority
  • Google Shopping feed — capture purchase-intent traffic
  • Health Hub content engine — own health search categories
  • GA4 tracking — measure every rand of marketing spend
Pillar Three
3
Artificial Intelligence

Personalisation at scale. Automation that compounds. AI systems that learn from every customer interaction — recommending the right products, answering questions 24/7, generating content at 10× speed, and turning first-time buyers into loyal advocates.

  • AI Health Advisor — personalised supplement consultations
  • AI Recommender Engine — intelligent upsell and bundling
  • AI Content Suite — SEO content at scale, always on-brand
  • AI Service Bot — 70% query resolution, zero wait time

02
Pillar One · Part A — Already Presented

National Television.
Mass reach at peak demand.

Television remains South Africa's most powerful mass-awareness channel. We've already secured four targeted packages at discounts of up to 69% off card rate — covering entertainment, lifestyle, sport and Afrikaans audiences during peak winter immune-support demand.

Campaign objectives
1
Position Vital as the leading immune-support brand during winter
2
Increase national brand awareness through mass-reach TV across 4 targeted packages
3
Create a campaign foundation that can be replicated across future promotional bursts
4
Drive consumers online and in-store with high-frequency, trusted brand messaging
5
Align TV creative with digital and in-store campaigns for one unified brand message
6
Encourage adoption of healthier lifestyle habits through trusted VHF product solutions
Television packages — proposed rates & descriptions
Package Description Spots Est. Value Our Rate
Core Connect High-reach national TV — 11 channels incl. Braco Africa, Mzansi Magic, National Geographic, TLC. 60% prime / 40% shoulder slots. 81 R 333 382 R 149 971
Luxe Access Premium channel placement — BBC Brit, BBC Lifestyle, Food Network, HISTORY, M-Net, VIA. High-visibility prime & shoulder slots. 87 R 340 065 R 149 933
Power Play Multi-channel sport — SS Premier League, SS Rugby, SS Cricket, SS Golf, SS Tennis, SS Motorsport. 60% prime / 40% shoulder. 80 R 489 960 R 150 032
KykNet Premium Afrikaans audience — KykNet only. 50% prime / 50% shoulder. Dedicated Afrikaans household targeting. 18 R 152 100 R 95 040
Total — all 4 packages combined 266 R 1 315 507 R 545 976
58% average saving secured off open card rate · 60% prime / 40% shoulder where applicable
266
TV spots secured across 17 channels at an average discount of 58% off card rate — reaching millions of South African households at peak winter health-concern moments. Every spot drives consumers to search for Vital online. The digital and AI layers capture every one of those searches.
03
Pillar One · Part B — Already Presented

In-store & experiential.
Face-to-face at the moment of purchase.

While television builds awareness nationally, brand activations convert that awareness into purchases at the exact moment consumers are making health decisions. A premium reusable mall stand plus 24-store in-store activation programme — designed to be deployed across events and retail for years to come.

In-Store Activations
Clicks & Dis-Chem — 24 Stores Nationwide

Branded promotional spaces with trained brand ambassadors across 24 stores nationally — sampling, product education, and a 5-question health questionnaire driving personalised product recommendations to every customer.

  • 24 stores × 2 days × 5hrs — 240 brand ambassador shifts
  • Branded VHF dress & labcoats — professional, trusted presentation
  • Sampling tables with branded header and wrap
  • Consumer health questionnaire — personalised product recommendation
  • 3 regional ops managers for seamless national execution
R 209 051.60 ex VAT · 48 activations total
Mall Stand & Events
Premium Reusable Mall Stand — Long-Term Brand Asset

A custom-built, premium modular brand stand — designed to be deployed at malls and major events throughout 2026 and beyond. This is a once-off build that becomes a permanent, reusable Vital asset for every future campaign.

  • 4 mall activations — MOA, Sandton City, Menlyn, Rosebank
  • 528 brand ambassador hours across 4 locations
  • Comrades Marathon · Two Oceans · Healthy Living Expo · Comic Con
  • Premium build: pill bottle archway, living green walls, service plinths
  • Setup, strike, transport and logistics fully managed
R 589 893.65 · once-off build + 4 mall activations
Stand design renders — as presented to Vital Health Foods

528
Brand ambassador hours across 4 premium mall locations — every interaction capturing consumer health data, driving product education, and feeding real purchase intent directly back into the AI recommendation engine. The mall stand doesn't just activate — it generates data that makes the entire digital and AI system smarter.
03
Pillar Two — The Digital Opportunity

You're SA's #1 supplement brand.
Google doesn't know that yet.

Your TV campaigns are driving millions of South Africans to search for Vital online — and right now, they're finding your competitors instead. Our audit of vital.co.za reveals a significant gap between your real-world authority and your digital footprint. This is actually good news — it means enormous, measurable upside.

Domain authority — vital vs competitors
Vital Health Foods ← You34
Clicks.co.za85
Dis-Chem.co.za78
Solal.co.za42
Biogen.co.za38
Google presence — current status
Google Shopping Feed
No product feed active — entire shopping intent channel missed
Missing
Google My Business
Listed, but product catalogue not linked
Partial
GA4 Conversion Tracking
Events firing but conversion paths not measured
Gaps
Technical & content issues identified
Page Speed — Core Web Vitals
Product pages scoring below 50/100 on mobile. Google directly penalises slow pages in rankings.
Critical
Missing Product Schema Markup
No structured data on 70+ products — Google cannot show rich results (price, reviews, availability).
Critical
Thin Product Descriptions
Most pages under 200 words — well below the 800+ word threshold needed to rank for category keywords.
Critical
Zero FAQ / Featured Snippet Coverage
Massive position-zero opportunity for health queries — "best vitamin for energy", "collagen benefits" — currently missed entirely.
Critical
Health Hub — Underutilised Asset
Articles exist but no editorial calendar, no internal linking to products, not structured for search intent.
Medium
Category Page Meta Titles
Generic titles missing keyword modifiers — "South Africa", "best", "buy" — low click-through rate in results.
Medium
Internal Linking Structure
Health Hub articles not linked to relevant product pages — the content-to-conversion loop is broken.
Minor
Keywords you're invisible for — that your customers are actively searching after seeing your TV ads
best vitamins for women South Africa
2,400 searches / month
Not Ranked
vitamin D deficiency symptoms SA
5,400 searches / month
Not Ranked
immune booster supplements
3,200 searches / month
Page 2
best sleep supplement South Africa
960 searches / month
Not Ranked
~50K
We estimate Vital is losing 40,000–60,000 organic visits per month to competitors — customers your TV campaigns are sending to Google right now. With 75 years of expert knowledge and a winter campaign already running, you have everything needed to dominate search. We're here to make sure every rand you spend on TV translates into digital authority that compounds.
04
Pillar Three — The Intelligence Layer

Four AI engines.
One connected ecosystem.

Not four separate tools bolted together — a purpose-built AI infrastructure designed around how Vital's customers actually behave, from the first TV ad through to lifetime loyalty. These systems learn, improve, and compound in value every single day.

01 / Health Intelligence
AI Health & Supplement Advisor

A personalised health consultation experience powered by Vital's 75 years of pharmacist and dietician expertise — available 24/7, at scale, on your website. The digital version of your in-store brand ambassadors, always on. Hover to explore.

  • Symptom & lifestyle-based health intake flow
  • Personalised supplement stacks recommended
  • SAHPRA-compliant — no medical diagnosis claims
  • Escalates complex queries to human experts
  • Multilingual: English, Afrikaans, Zulu
  • Captures consented first-party health data
Est. +20–35% conversion lift on product pages
02 / Revenue Intelligence
AI Product Recommender Engine

A real-time recommendation engine that learns from browsing behaviour, purchase patterns, and health goals — turning every website visitor into a personalised shopping experience. Powered by the same consumer data your in-store questionnaires capture. Hover to explore.

  • "Customers like you also take..." widgets
  • Supplement stack bundling with smart pricing
  • Lifecycle-aware: pregnancy → postnatal logic
  • Seasonal health campaign triggers
  • Email personalisation for lapsed customers
  • Retailer API integration: Clicks, Takealot
Est. +15–25% average basket size increase
03 / Content Intelligence
AI Content Generation Suite

An AI content engine trained on Vital's brand voice — generating SEO-optimised product pages, Health Hub articles, social captions, TV script briefs, and email campaigns at 10× the output. The engine that feeds both your digital and traditional campaigns simultaneously. Hover to explore.

  • Bulk product description rewrite — all 70+ SKUs
  • Weekly Health Hub articles targeting keyword gaps
  • Social captions for Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn
  • TV campaign brief generation (aligned with ATL)
  • Monthly newsletter content with product spotlights
  • Brand voice guardrails — always on-brand
Est. 8–10× content output at fraction of agency cost
04 / Service Intelligence
AI Customer Service Bot

An intelligent first-response system handling Vital's inbound queries across web, WhatsApp, and email — resolving 70%+ of questions instantly. The always-on counterpart to your in-store brand ambassadors, available to every South African customer 24 hours a day. Hover to explore.

  • Instant answers to product & ingredient FAQs
  • WhatsApp Business API integration
  • Stockist lookup by location — drive in-store traffic
  • Order status & retailer redirect
  • Seamless human handoff for complex queries
  • Conversation analytics dashboard
Est. 60–75% query deflection rate

Traditional Creates Demand
TV · In-Store · Mall Activations · Events

Your winter TV campaign reaches millions of South African households. People see Vital on screen, meet your brand ambassadors at the mall, and walk out with a reason to learn more. Traditional marketing is the spark — it generates the search volume and brand recognition that makes everything else possible.

Feeds into →
Digital captures the search traffic TV creates
2
Digital Captures the Intent
SEO · Content · Google Shopping · Analytics

When they search after seeing your TV ad, Vital owns the result. SEO-optimised product pages, Health Hub articles ranking for immune support keywords, Google Shopping ads serving products instantly. The 50,000 monthly visits currently lost to competitors become Vital traffic — measured, tracked, and converted.

Feeds into →
AI converts website visitors into loyal customers
3
AI Converts & Retains
Health Advisor · Recommender · Content · Service Bot

Once they land on your site, AI takes over. The Health Advisor personalises their supplement journey, the Recommender builds tailored stacks, and the Service Bot resolves queries instantly. Every interaction generates first-party data — feeding audience intelligence back into your TV targeting to make the next campaign smarter and more precise.

Feeds into →
Data makes Traditional campaigns smarter & more targeted

The competitors who act on one pillar
cannot compete with a brand that owns all three.

Biogen is running digital. Solal is investing in SEO. International entrants are spending on TV. None of them have built a system where all three compound together. That window is open right now — and it narrows every month that passes. N3XUS already runs Vital's television and activations. We know your brand, your tone, your customers. The digital and AI layers can go live immediately. There is no learning curve. There is no agency handover. There is only acceleration.

The Combined Roadmap

What winning looks
like across all three pillars.

A phased approach that builds on the traditional foundation already in place — layering digital authority and AI infrastructure on top of the winter campaign to create a fully integrated growth engine that compounds in value through 2026 and beyond.

1
Phase One
March – May 2026
Foundation & Traditional Launch
  • Winter campaign creative development
  • Mall stand design & build
  • TV media planning & booking
  • Full technical SEO overhaul
  • Google Shopping feed activation
  • Schema markup — all 70+ products
  • GA4 conversion tracking audit
  • AI Content Engine launch
2
Phase Two
June – August 2026
Campaign Launch & AI Go-Live
  • TV campaign live — all 4 packages
  • First 4 mall activations (MOA, Sandton, Menlyn, Rosebank)
  • 24 in-store activations — Clicks & Dis-Chem
  • AI Health Advisor — live on website
  • WhatsApp Service Bot launch
  • Email personalisation engine
  • Health Hub SEO editorial calendar live
  • Monthly performance reporting across all pillars
3
Phase Three
September – December 2026
Scale, Events & Ecosystem Lock-In
  • AI Recommender Engine — live
  • Mall stand rollout at wellness events
  • Takealot & Clicks API integration
  • Supplement stack bundle logic
  • Full ecosystem analytics dashboard
  • TV + AI attribution model
  • Comrades & Two Oceans event activation
  • Year 2 roadmap planning
Estimated outcomes — all three pillars combined

is the only partner
that can deliver this.

We already run Vital's television campaigns and brand activations. We know your brand, your tone, your values, and your customers deeply — there's no ramp-up, no knowledge transfer, no agency learning curve.

What we're proposing is the natural next chapter — building the digital and AI layers that amplify every rand you already spend on traditional marketing. One unified strategy. One accountable partner. Three pillars working in perfect unison.

No other agency in South Africa can offer Vital this. They can do one, maybe two. We do all three — and we already know your brand.
